TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
WITH SNAPSHOT_hist AS ( SELECT ASST_ID, ACCT_STAT_DESC, INSTRC_DESC, TOT_RCVRY_AMT, STAT_DESC, TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT, BASEL_ACCT_ID, HGHWY_CD, ASGNMN_DT, PGM_TP_CD, ASST_NUM FROM GDAW.ASST_DRC_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID=(SELECT MAX(MTH_TM_ID) FROM GDAW.ASST_DRC_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID<$$TM_ID AND (TOT_RCVRY_AMT IS NOT NULL AND TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT IS NOT NULL) ) --ORDER BY MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_ACCT_ID,HGHWY_CD,ASGNMN_DT,PGM_TP_CD,ASST_NUM DESC -- ) SELECT SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID, SNAPSHOT.ASST_NUM, SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID, SNAPSHOT.ACCT_NUM, TRIM(SNAPSHOT.SRC_SYS_CD), TRIM(SNAPSHOT.PGM_TP_CD) PGM_TP_CD, SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT, SNAPSHOT.INSTRC_DESC, SNAPSHOT.STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT.ACCT_STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT.TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT, SNAPSHOT.TOT_RCVRY_AMT, TRIM(SNAPSHOT.HGHWY_CD) HGHWY_CD,
SNAPSHOT_hist.ASST_ID AS hist_ASST_ID, SNAPSHOT_hist.INSTRC_DESC AS hist_INSTRC_DESC, SNAPSHOT_hist.STAT_DESC AS hist_STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT_hist.ACCT_STAT_DESC AS hist_ACCT_STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT_hist.TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT AS hist_TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT, SNAPSHOT_hist.TOT_RCVRY_AMT AS hist_TOT_RCVRY_AMT
FROM ASST_DRC_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT SNAPSHOT
JOIN BASEL_ACCT_DIM BAD ON SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID=BAD.BASEL_ACCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SNAPSHOT_hist SNAPSHOT_hist ON SNAPSHOT_hist.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND TRIM(SNAPSHOT_hist.ASST_NUM)=TRIM(SNAPSHOT.ASST_NUM) AND TRIM(SNAPSHOT_hist.HGHWY_CD)=TRIM(SNAPSHOT.HGHWY_CD) AND DATE(SNAPSHOT_hist.ASGNMN_DT)=DATE(SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT) AND TRIM(SNAPSHOT_hist.PGM_TP_CD)=TRIM(SNAPSHOT.PGM_TP_CD)
WHERE SNAPSHOT.SRC_SYS_CD IN ('MOR', 'SPL', 'KS') AND SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT > '10/31/2003' AND SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT IS NOT NULL AND SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID IS NOT NULL AND SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID
ORDER BY BASEL_ACCT_ID,HGHWY_CD,ASGNMN_DT,PGM_TP_CD,ASST_NUM

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: DECODE(TRUE, (ISNULL(SRC_SYS_CD) OR SRC_SYS_CD='' OR NOT IN(SRC_SYS_CD,'MOR','SPL','KS',0)),'Y', IN(SRC_SYS_CD,'MOR','SPL',0) AND NOT IS_NUMBER(ACCT_NUM),'Y', v_ASGNMN_DT<= TO_DATE('2003-10-31','YYYY-MM-DD'),'Y', 'N' )
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DISCARD_F

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-C-0-4
(where the main script is called from) $$SCRIPT_DIR=/owdev/scripts (the environment; DEV, SYS, UAT, PROD) $$ENVMNT=DEV (the project folder without prefix) $$PROJ_FOLDR=STGN_SCENE (the workflow and session name for the abend log file and triger) $$WRKFLW_SESS=wf_STGN_SCENE_Load_DIMs.s_STGN_SCENE_INS_UPD_SCENE_MBR_ACCT_ACTY_TP_DIM
TASK.NAME: cmd_post_session_failure_alert

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
WITH SNAPSHOT_hist AS ( SELECT ASST_ID, ACCT_STAT_DESC, INSTRC_DESC, TOT_RCVRY_AMT, STAT_DESC, TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT, BASEL_ACCT_ID, HGHWY_CD, ASGNMN_DT, PGM_TP_CD, ASST_NUM FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.ASST_DRC_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID=(SELECT MAX(MTH_TM_ID) FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.ASST_DRC_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID<$$TM_ID AND (TOT_RCVRY_AMT IS NOT NULL AND TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT IS NOT NULL) ) --ORDER BY MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_ACCT_ID,HGHWY_CD,ASGNMN_DT,PGM_TP_CD,ASST_NUM DESC -- ) SELECT SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID, SNAPSHOT.ASST_NUM, SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID, SNAPSHOT.ACCT_NUM, TRIM(SNAPSHOT.SRC_SYS_CD), TRIM(SNAPSHOT.PGM_TP_CD) PGM_TP_CD, SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT, SNAPSHOT.INSTRC_DESC, SNAPSHOT.STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT.ACCT_STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT.TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT, SNAPSHOT.TOT_RCVRY_AMT, TRIM(SNAPSHOT.HGHWY_CD) HGHWY_CD,
SNAPSHOT_hist.ASST_ID AS hist_ASST_ID, SNAPSHOT_hist.INSTRC_DESC AS hist_INSTRC_DESC, SNAPSHOT_hist.STAT_DESC AS hist_STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT_hist.ACCT_STAT_DESC AS hist_ACCT_STAT_DESC, SNAPSHOT_hist.TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT AS hist_TOT_COST_EXPNS_AMT, SNAPSHOT_hist.TOT_RCVRY_AMT AS hist_TOT_RCVRY_AMT
FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.ASST_DRC_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT SNAPSHOT
JOIN $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_ACCT_DIM BAD ON SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID=BAD.BASEL_ACCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SNAPSHOT_hist SNAPSHOT_hist ON SNAPSHOT_hist.BASEL_ACCT_ID=SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND TRIM(SNAPSHOT_hist.ASST_NUM)=TRIM(SNAPSHOT.ASST_NUM) AND TRIM(SNAPSHOT_hist.HGHWY_CD)=TRIM(SNAPSHOT.HGHWY_CD) AND DATE(SNAPSHOT_hist.ASGNMN_DT)=DATE(SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT) AND TRIM(SNAPSHOT_hist.PGM_TP_CD)=TRIM(SNAPSHOT.PGM_TP_CD)
WHERE SNAPSHOT.SRC_SYS_CD IN ('MOR', 'SPL', 'KS') AND SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT > '10/31/2003' AND SNAPSHOT.ASGNMN_DT IS NOT NULL AND SNAPSHOT.BASEL_ACCT_ID IS NOT NULL AND SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID
ORDER BY BASEL_ACCT_ID,HGHWY_CD,ASGNMN_DT,PGM_TP_CD,ASST_NUM

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: SHARED
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Where all shared objects will reside. Only save sources, targets, transformations and mapplets in this folder. Never save any mappings in here!!!!
